title: [IOS]App Settings - General - Account - Log in - Log out - Continue
scenario: Verify user can log in and log out via App Settings > General > Account, with correct UI states after each action.
steps: Tap Continue and log in with credentials
Verify 'Your account' text with Name and Email fields populated
Verify login dialog opens with Cancel and Continue options
Verify user is logged out, 'Your account' text shows 'You aren't currently logged in', and Log in button is visible
expected: User can log in successfully (Name and Email fields populated under 'Your account'), then log out successfully (dialog with Cancel and Continue appears, after tapping Continue user is logged out, 'Your account' shows 'You aren't currently logged in', and Log in button is visible).
